channel.title: Supplements
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Supplements, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Animal M-Stak upgraded for 2026 with PEAK ATP
item.description: The non-hormonal muscle builder has been rebuilt with new ingredients.

item.title: Elite-tier functional mushrooms: Inside NuCelium
item.description: Podcast episode dives into functional mushroom cultivation with NuCelium co-founders.

item.title: Gaspari Nutrition SizeOn Get Swole new formula
item.description: Updated formula includes Amino9, HMB, and six grams of creatine.

item.title: NNB Nutrition launches Clean & Clear plant protein
item.description: New plant protein designed for the clear protein beverage market.
